name: Air Disasters
overview: Catastrophic incidents in aviation history are meticulously reenacted, providing insight into what went wrong and if the crashes and near-disasters could have been prevented. Accounts from survivors combine with cockpit recordings and computer images to weave the gripping tales, and expert testimony reveals the hows and whys behind the events, some of which have resulted in important changes to aviation safety and regulations.

trailers.title: Most Watched Air Disasters Of 2023 ✈️ SUPER COMPILATION
5 Perils Over The Pacific Ocean 🌊 Air Disasters | Smithsonian Channel
